---
title: "04 Deconvolution Review"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source("01_main_setup.R")
module <- "04_deconvolution_review"
```

```{r}
ct <- read_optional_tsv(file.path(result_dir, "08_cell_type_annotation", "tables", "cell_type_counts.tsv"))
if (nrow(ct) > 0) {
  write_review_table(ct, module, "cell_type_counts_review.csv")
  p <- ct |>
    ggplot(aes(sample, n_spots, fill = cell_type_pred)) +
    geom_col(position = "fill") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = rep(pandoraseq_palette, 50)) +
    theme_spatial() +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Fraction of spots")
  save_plot_versions(p, module, "cell_type_fraction_by_sample", width = 8, height = 5)
  p
}
```
